description: This pipeline generates ROI from labels, starting with the input of labels and then generating ROI.

41ba4d56-4659-4483-9996-78a2499d1cd0.name: clij:plugin:net.haesleinhuepf.clij2.plugins.ExcludeLabelsOnEdges
41ba4d56-4659-4483-9996-78a2499d1cd0.description:
Removes all labels from a label map which touch the edges of the image (in X, Y and Z if the image is 3D).

Remaining label elements are renumbered afterwards.

Parameters: Image label_map_input, ByRef Image label_map_destination
Available for: 2D, 3D



Please be aware that this node was generated automatically by JIPipe from existing interfaces provided by CLIJ. Please contact the JIPipe developers if you find any issues.

c25eb7f9-1860-4efd-abf1-3a260d542d61.name: ij1-labels-to-roi
c25eb7f9-1860-4efd-abf1-3a260d542d61.description: Converts a label image into a set of ROI. Labels must have a value larger than zero to be detected.If higher-dimensional data is provided, the filter is applied to each 2D slice. The Z/C/T coordinates of the source slices are saved inside the ROI.
